items.title: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic.

items.description: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan t…
items.description_zh: 个人更新：我已加入 Anthropic。我认为LLM前沿的未来几年将尤其具有影响力。我很高兴能加入这里的团队并回到研发部门。我仍然对教育充满热情并计划……

items.title: there's 4 parts to this AI SDLC 1.
items.title_zh: 此 AI SDLC 1 有 4 个部分。
items.description: there's 4 parts to this AI SDLC 1. have ~50 tests in place, with instructions to add more, including "make a memory that whenever you do browser e2e tests, use computer vision to visually spot check design and ux issues as well on mobile/d…
items.description_zh: 此 AI SDLC 分为 4 个部分 1. 进行了约 50 项测试，并附有添加更多测试的说明，包括“记住，每当您进行浏览器 e2e 测试时，都使用计算机视觉来直观地检查设计和用户体验问题，以及移动/d 上的问题……

items.title: Introducing Gemini Spark!
items.description: Introducing Gemini Spark! Our 24/7 personal AI agent designed to proactively manage tasks and help you navigate your digital life, all under your direction. Coming to trusted testers this week, and as a Beta for US Google AI Ultra subscrib…

items.title: Met a lot of great folks at Google IO @gregisenberg @alliekmiller @AlexFinn One thing I t…
items.title_zh: 在 Google IO 遇到了很多很棒的人 @gregisenberg @alliekmiller @AlexFinn 我知道的一件事......
items.description: Met a lot of great folks at Google IO @gregisenberg @alliekmiller @AlexFinn One thing I think about often living both the PM and creator life is I don’t want to be just an “influencer” wielding a selfie cam. I want to be a builder and shar…
items.description_zh: 在 Google IO 遇到了很多很棒的人 @gregisenberg @alliekmiller @AlexFinn 我经常想到的一件事是，我经常过着产品经理和创作者的生活，我不想只是一个挥舞着自拍相机的“影响者”。我想成为一名建设者和分享者……

items.title: Happy anniversary, @FlowbyGoogle!
items.description: Happy anniversary, @FlowbyGoogle! From text-to-video to Omni, agent, and Tools - what a ride it has been. 🚀 Keep pushing the boundaries! On to year two. ⚡ https://t.co/3Hh0kRdLP6
items.description_zh: 周年纪念快乐，@FlowbyGoogle！从文本到视频到 Omni、代理和工具 - 这是一次多么美妙的旅程。 🚀 不断突破界限！到了第二年。 ⚡ https://t.co/3Hh0kRdLP6
